description_long: This is a round, deep bowl with a wide opening and a slightly curved base. The exterior is decorated with a winter landscape scene, featuring snow-covered trees, small houses with white roofs, and a night sky with falling snow and a full moon. The artwork is rendered in textured, raised paint, giving the surface a tactile, frosted appearance. The color palette includes deep blues, purples, and whites, with hints of yellow and brown near the base to suggest ground or light. The interior of the bowl is a solid, dark blue, contrasting with the detailed exterior. The rim is smooth and white, framing the painted scene.
description: A round bowl with a wide opening, decorated with a textured winter landscape of snowy trees, houses, and a night sky. The exterior features raised, frosted paintwork, while the interior is a solid dark blue.
description_view_0: This view shows the bowl's front with two snow-covered trees, a small house with a white roof and window, and a gradient sky transitioning from yellow to deep blue.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a snow-laden evergreen tree, falling snow, and part of a house, with the winter scene wrapping around the bowl.
description_view_2: This view centers on two houses with snowy roofs, a large full moon, and more snow-covered trees, emphasizing the night setting.
description_view_3: This view focuses on another snow-covered evergreen tree and the continuation of the winter landscape, with less of the houses visible.
attribute_location: dining table or kitchen in a home or café
attribute_context_of_use: serving food or as a decorative centerpiece
attribute_decorative_patterns: Hand-painted winter landscape with snow-covered trees, houses, falling snow, and a full moon encircling the exterior.
